name: nuvanx-system
description: Unified workspace commands for Nuvanx System

scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend ci --legacy-peer-deps && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.supabase:types: npx --yes supabase gen types typescript --local --schema public > frontend/src/lib/supabase/types.ts
scripts.verify:doctoralia-config: node -e 'const req=["DOCTORALIA_SHEET_ID","DATABASE_URL","CLINIC_ID","GOOGLE_ADS_SERVICE_ACCOUNT","SHEET_NAME"]; console.log("Verificando configuración de Doctoralia..."); req.forEach(v=>process.env[v]?console.log(`✅ ${v} configurada`):console.error(`❌ Falta variable: ${v}`))'
